name: white fox
bio: Ami Han, the last of the legendary Kumiho, can summon her ancestral Nine-Tailed Power to fortify herself and heal her allies on the battlefield. As the calm and capable Director of Tiger Division, she is any team's unwavering backbone, no matter the foe.

abilities.name: Ancestral Force
abilities.description: Not shown in F1, no description is required.

abilities.name: Yeowoo Guseul
abilities.description: Fire a Fox Marble forward that bounces off terrain or heroes, then homes in on nearby heroes. It damages enemies, heals allies, and restores <Orange>Spirit Tail</> energy.

additional_fields.Damage: Direct hit: 40 per round; bounce hit: 25 per round
additional_fields.Healing Amount: Direct hit: 50 per round; bounce hit: 35 per round

abilities.name: Reload
abilities.description: Not shown in F1, no description is required.

abilities.name: Melee Attack
abilities.description: Not shown in F1, no description is required.

abilities.name: Spectral Surge
abilities.description: Consume one <Orange>Spirit Tail</> to send a spectral fox forward and instantly restore Health. The fox heals and grants <Buff>invulnerability</> to allies it passes through, while damaging and <Debuff>Charming</> enemies, luring them toward White Fox.

abilities.name: Fox Form Awakening
abilities.description: Enter <Orange>Awakened</> state, transforming <Orange>Spirit Tails</> into physical tails. While active, continuously drain <Orange>Spirit Tail</> energy and <Buff>heal</> nearby allies. Striking enemies provides additional area healing.

abilities.name: Claw Strike
abilities.description: While <Orange>Awakened</>, slash forward with a flurry of attacks.

abilities.name: Tail Sweep
abilities.description: While <Orange>Awakened</>, sweep forward tails to <Debuff>launch up</> hit enemies.

abilities.name: Predatory Pounce
abilities.description: While <Orange>Awakened</>, dash forward. Hit an enemy to <Debuff>Slow</> and flip over them, enabling a <Debuff>second dash</> that <Orange>knocks back</> enemies.

abilities.name: Spirit Sanctuary
abilities.description: Teleport to a chosen ally, instantly healing White Fox and allies in the area while generating a shield. While the shield is active, White Fox and allies within gain <Buff>Healing Over Time</>.

additional_fields.Special Effect: While the shield is active, it provides 20/s Healing Over Time to allies (including White Fox) within the shield's range

abilities.name: Kumiho Unleashed
abilities.description: Manifest the full Nine-Tailed Fox form and <Buff>continuously heal</> nearby allies. Cannot receive healing effects from others while in this form.

abilities.name: Ninefold Slam
abilities.description: In <Orange>Kumiho Form</>, slam the ground, causing an explosive shockwave. Hitting enemies or summons grants One-Time Healing to self and nearby allies.

abilities.name: Blessed By The Nine
abilities.description: In <Orange>Kumiho Form</>, select an ally to grant <Buff>Continuous Healing</>, <Buff>Unstoppable</>, and <Buff>Lifesteal</> for a short time.

abilities.name: Kumiho Unleashed
abilities.description: Manifest the full Nine-Tailed Fox form and <Buff>continuously heal</> nearby allies. Cannot receive healing effects from others while in this form.

abilities.name: Ancestral Force
abilities.description: Not shown in F1, no description is required.
